variables.label: Fixed
variables.description: Subtitles no longer drift on variable-frame-rate source clips.

visuals.svg: <svg width='1200' height='630' viewBox='0 0 1200 630' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><defs><linearGradient id='bg' x1='0' y1='0' x2='1' y2='1'><stop offset='0' stop-color='#0E1A12'/><stop offset='0.55' stop-color='#0A0D0B'/><stop offset='1' stop-color='#080A09'/></linearGradient><radialGradient id='glow' cx='0.15' cy='0.14' r='0.62'><stop offset='0' stop-color='#3FB950' stop-opacity='0.22'/><stop offset='1' stop-color='#3FB950' stop-opacity='0'/></radialGradient></defs><rect width='1200' height='630' fill='url(#bg)'/><rect width='1200' height='630' fill='url(#glow)'/><rect x='24' y='24' width='1152' height='582' rx='28' fill='none' stroke='#FFFFFF' stroke-opacity='0.07' stroke-width='1.5'/></svg>
